name: Almond-Sausage Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. To roast the almonds, place in an oiled pan on the stove and stir frequently until golden.
2. Brown the sausage in a frying pan, breaking it apart as it cooks.
3. Add the drained sausage to the skillet with the drippings, along with the bread cubes.
4. Add celery, onions, and mushrooms to the drippings in the skillet and cook until tender-crisp.
5. Stir into the sausage mixture, adding the almonds and poultry seasoning.
6. Heat the mushroom liquid separately and pour over the dressing.
7. Add the beaten egg and toss until mixed thoroughly.
This makes enough for a 20 lb. bird.
